---
name: test-evidence
description: Build a concise evidence summary for a feature by mapping acceptance criteria to checks results residual risk and where relevant Next.js to Python integration evidence.
argument-hint: A feature folder, testing task, or acceptance criterion set.
---

Read `requirements.md`, `testing-plan.md`, and any available execution results. Produce or update the evidence section of `testing-report.md` with explicit pass fail partial outcomes and residual risk.
